summary_en: Update to capital cost and stock price-conscious management initiatives. Prior framework disclosed May 2025; current filing provides progress status and forward outlook on cost-of-capital targets and execution.
title_en: Notice of Update: Response to Realizing Management Conscious of Capital Cost and Stock Price
translation_en_brief: Key Coffee Inc filed an update on its capital cost and stock price-conscious management initiatives on 15 May 2026. This is a progress report on a framework initially disclosed on 15 May 2025. The filing references detailed materials attached separately that outline updated progress metrics and forward-looking execution plans, but the headline document itself does not disclose specific numeric targets, KPI levels, or time horizons in the excerpt provided. The company states it will update stakeholders on the status of prior commitments and articulate next steps in cost-of-capital and shareholder value alignment.
